description: Analyze non-residential space utilization efficiency across San Francisco by computing the ratio of non-residential square footage to jobs at the zone level. Using the 'UrbanSim (Python 3)' kernel in Jupyter Lab, merge the buildings, jobs, and parcels tables from /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5 to aggregate total_non_res_sqft and total_jobs by zone_id. Calculate sqft_per_job and filter for zones where total_non_res_sqft > 0 and total_jobs >= 1. Save the results, sorted by sqft_per_job in ascending order, to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/zone_space_utilization.csv including columns zone_id, total_non_res_sqft, total_jobs, and sqft_per_job. Create a scatter plot titled "Non-Residential Space vs Employment by Zone" visualizing total_jobs on the x-axis and total_non_res_sqft on the y-axis, saved to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/space_utilization_scatter.png. Document the entire process in a fully executed notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/space_utilization.ipynb.
